title: rosa × falcata var. intricata
intro: Rosa × falcata var. intricata, also known as the intricata rose or Rosa falcata intricata, is a variety of rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × falcata var. intricata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rosa × falcata var. intricata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
